raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz la Kristus tas ap,
foblihts Meſtijas wiſſu Pagazu Eepreezina,
fchana eekſch ta mahihs : 7. Ar weenâ
Upsobliſchanaſ/ ja tee tikkufchi to Mammu
uſjels/taps tee laizigi un muhſchigi apſweh-
titi : 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Divideſmitâ zettorâ
Mehnes Deenâ/ ſeſtâ
Mehneſi/ ohtrâ Gaddâ
ta Kehnixa Darijuſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Septitâ Mehneſi/ diwi-
deſnitâ pirmâ Deenâ tahs Meh-
nes/ notikfe ta KUNga Wahrdē
aur to Praweetu Aggaju/ kas
aſſtja:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Runna jelle uhs Seruba-
belu/ Sealtiêta Dehlu/to Wald-
eeſu Juhda/ un uhs Josuu/ Jo-
adaka Dehlu/ to augſtu Pree-
ſtert/ un uhs teem atlifkuscheem
Landim/ un faſſti:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kutzch irr juhtu Starpâ
atlizzis/ kas ſcho Namma ſawa
pirimâ Godhibâ irr redſejs/ un
to paſchu nu reds? Neggi tas
orett winnu ta ka neneeka juhsâs
Azzis?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr nu/ ſtiprinajees
Serubabel/ faſka tas KUNgs :
In ſtiprinajees Josuns tu Dehls
Jozadaka/ tu augſts Preeſteri/
uu ſtiprinajtees wiſſi Laudis tahs
Semines/ taſka tas KUNGS/
in ſtrahdajt/ jo es efmu ar juws/
faſka tas KUNGS Zebaot:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ar to Wahrdū/ zaur fo es
ar juws weenu Derribu darriju/
rad juhs no Egiptes.Semmes
iſgahjat/ un ar mannu Garru/
kas juhsu Widdû paleek. Ne
oibſteeters!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta faſka tas KUNgs
Zebaot : Wehl weens maſb
Brihds irraid/ tad liſchu es
Debbeſt un Semini/ Juhen un
Gaufunu kuſtinates.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir es liſchu wiſſus Pa-
ganus kuſtinates/ un tad nahks
ta Eepreezinachana wiſfo Pa-
ganu. Un es peeſpilſchu ſcho
Nammu ar Godhibas/ faſka tas
KUNGS Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Man peederr tas Sud-
rabs/ un man peederr tas Selts/
faſka tas KUNGS Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Godhiba ſcha pehdiga
Namna buhs leelaka neka ta
pirma/ faſka tas KUNGS Ze-
baot: Un ſchai Weetai dohſchu
cs Meeru / faſka tas KUNGS
Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Divideſmitâ zettortâ
Deenâ/ dewitâ Mehneſi/ ohtrâ
Gaddâ Darijuſ / notikfe ta
KUNGA Wahrdē aur to Pra-
weetu Aggaju/ kas faſſtja:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta faſka tas KUNGS
Zebaot: Waiza jelle tohs Pree-
ſterus to Bauſlibu/ uu faſſti:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi / kad kas ſwehtu
Galtu ſawas Dreſbes Stuhri
nestu/ un aiſkahrtu ar ſawa
Stuhra to Maist/ jeb Pawal-
gu/ jeb Wihtu / jeb Etji/ jeb
wiſſadu Barribu/ arrig ta tap-
tu twehtita ? Un tee Preeſtert
atbildeja/ un faſſtja: Ne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faſſtja Aggajus:
Ja kas neſchkiſsts buhdains no
kahdas nomirruſchas Meesas /
jeb kahdu no ſchaſm Leetahm
Hhh 2
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
